summary: Completed full frontend testing of SubScrub web simulator. All 13 requested features tested. Found and fixed one critical UI bug: SIZINTI subscription cards appearing as empty boxes due to .leak-border CSS covering card content.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: .leak-border div (position:absolute; inset:0) had a solid surface-colored background covering card content (emoji icon, name, amount). Added z-index:-1 to .leak-border in index.html to push it behind content.

issues: GitHub Pro card shows no emoji icon (empty emoji slot) - minor data issue

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: .leak-border CSS bug - z-index:-1 needed to prevent animated border overlay from hiding card content
seed_data_creation: None - all data is hardcoded DEMO data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 test cases pass. Fixed .leak-border CSS bug (z-index:-1). Flows tested: Splash->Onboarding(4 slides)->Scan->Dashboard->Detail->Letter modal->Copy->Settings->KVKK jurisdiction. All working correctly.
